headline: SpaceX’s Starlink nabs American Airlines contract, another win for its IPO
summary: American Airlines said Tuesday it plans to install Starlink on more than 500 Airbus aircraft, the latest carrier win for IPO-bound SpaceX.

headline: S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 Climb to Record Highs on Tech Stock Strength

headline: Americans pick a new favorite airline for 2026
summary: There’s been a lot of shakeup in the airline industry in recent months. First, Southwest Airlines changed its long-standing open seating policy, much to passenger chagrin. Then, budget airline Spirit abruptly shuttered after 34 years in business. Now, a new airline has emerged as a customer ...

headline: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes
summary: American Airlines said it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes.
